title: helichrysum sanguineum
intro: Helichrysum sanguineum, also known as the red or bloody helichrysum, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Helichrysum sanguineum can be prepared in various forms, such as essential oil, capsules, or tea, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
